title: tanacetum ordubadense
intro: Tanacetum ordubadense, a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, is native to the Caucasus region and is also known as Caucasian tansy. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. Its health benefits include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum ordubadense can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
